results.title: NRA onboarding — Myanmar FDA
results.subtitle: Awaiting final account activation
results.description: Myanmar FDA has completed the onboarding documentation and is awaiting final account activation by the SEARN Secretariat. All required organisational details, admin contacts, and signed MoU have been received.

results.title: Framework submission — NRA Thailand
results.subtitle: NRA-specific domains awaiting approval
results.description: NRA Thailand submitted an updated competency framework for review. The submission includes additional NRA-specific domains and updates to proficiency levels. Review is pending final validation of mapped activities and role alignment.

results.title: Catalogue submission — PIC/S Training
results.subtitle: 3 programmes submitted for review
results.description: PIC/S submitted three new programmes for inclusion in the SEARN Training Catalog. The review requires additional information (learning outcomes, delivery method, and assessment criteria) before approval.

results.title: Training Provider onboarding — WHO EMRO
results.subtitle: Profile submitted, pending activation
results.description: The provider onboarding request was submitted but requires additional verification of organisation details and admin contacts.

results.title: NRA onboarding — Myanmar FDA (Archive)
results.subtitle: Archived request for testing
results.description: This is an archived mock request kept for backward compatibility with older IDs.
